bead.title: Phase 5: bump go.mod to agent v0.4.0-pre (new contract + legacy side-by-side)
bead.description:
Bump cli/go.mod from current ddx-agent v0.3.14 to v0.4.0-pre.<sha> (the pre-release that ships the new DdxAgent contract alongside legacy agentlib.Run). Run go mod tidy. Confirm DDx still compiles and existing tests pass — both APIs are available so nothing should break yet.

Pre-condition: agent-33ef96d9 (tag agent v0.4.0-pre) landed in agent repo.
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] cli/go.mod shows agent v0.4.0-pre.<sha>
- [ ] go mod tidy clean
- [ ] cd cli && make test passes
- [ ] No new compile warnings beyond the expected Deprecated: notices on legacy exports
